elements.description: FCO (floor cleanout) symbol at the top-left of the room
Ø4"SW vertical pipe on the left side, running the height of the plan
Ø3/4"CW vertical pipe adjacent to the Ø4"SW line
Ø1 1/2"W waste pipe near the fixture cluster
Ø2"FD floor drain near the fixture cluster, small square symbol
WC/toilet fixture icon at the room label 'ห้องน้ำ 1 +0.20' near the center-right of the plan
Ø2"V( UP ) at the bottom of the plan, vent pipe routed up
second Ø2"V vertical label at the bottom-left edge

warnings: This sheet (SN-07) contains 4 views total: 3 bathroom plan details (ห้องน้ำ 1, 3, 2 -- printed in that left-to-right, top-to-bottom order) plus a fixture pipe-size schedule table -- more views than house #3's equivalent SN-07 sheet (which had only 2 bathroom plans and no schedule table on the same sheet). Each view captured as a separate sibling file per the multi-view extraction rule.

This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic underfloor-piping detail of ground-floor ห้องน้ำ 1, explicitly noted '( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )' -- underfloor routing, matching this house's ground-floor plan (page53) room level (+0.20).

Exact fixture layout and precise pipe routing paths are only partially legible at this resolution -- positions and pipe-size callouts are best-effort, not measured coordinates; flagged for zoom-review.
grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true -- this is not on the building's structural plan grid.
